api_key.description: Nebius Token Factory API key. Sent as a Bearer token and never logged.

base_url.description: Nebius OpenAI-compatible API base URL override.

limit.description: Page size sent as the limit query parameter for list endpoints.

file_id.description: Path parameter file_id for the files_file_id stream.

job_id.description: Path parameter job_id for the fine_tuning_jobs_job_id stream.

checkpoint_id.description: Path parameter checkpoint_id for the fine_tuning_jobs_job_id_checkpoints_checkpoint_id stream.

dataset_id.description: Path parameter dataset_id for the datasets_dataset_id stream.

upload_id.description: Path parameter upload_id for the datasets_uploads_upload_id_parts stream.

operation_id.description: Path parameter operation_id for the operations_operation_id stream.
